form.formComment: Won two starts back over 400m at Bulli. Last start he finished 3rd in a Grade 4/5 on April 14 over 400m at Bulli behind Kooringa Express beaten 2.75 lengths (22.72). Draw likely to suit. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th on April 11 over 520m at this track behind Rugged Ethics beaten 4.5 lengths (30.24) in a Grade 5. Must be included.

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th in a Grade 4/5 on April 14 over 400m at Bulli behind Kooringa Express beaten 5.5 lengths (22.90). Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 4th in a Grade 4/5 on April 14 over 400m at Bulli behind Kooringa Express beaten 5.5 lengths (22.90). Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Backs up after winning by 2 lengths at Maitland (24.89) beating Rolling In Mud in a Grade 5 on April 13 five days ago. Likely to find this a lot tougher and he needs to find another gear.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 5 lengths at this track over 520m (29.28) beating Before The Dawn in NG on April 9. Prepared to just watch this time.

form.formComment: Comes off a (17.35) win last time, scoring by 0.8 lengths in a Grade 4/5 over 300m at Taree Super Track. Has two wins and two placings from seven starts from the draw. Tough line-up and may struggle.

form.formComment: Working her way into winning form after her success on January 24 at this track over 520m. Last start was fourth over 520m in 30.02, behind Foreign Capital. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Finished fourth (23.12) last start at Wagga. Prior to that had recorded three minor placings in a row. Has to overcome a wide draw and appears tested on latest effort.
